content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_SafetyStockAllocation
as
SELECT          A.*, B.[Priority 7 Safety Stock Level]
FROM
(
SELECT          ST.OBV2 AS          [Customer Number]
,               CUNM AS             [Customer Name]
,               ST.OBV1 AS          [Item Number]
,                                   [Item Name]
,               [Master Data Brand] as Brand
,               MB.WHLO AS          [Warehouse]
,               SSQT AS             [Safety Stock Qty]
,               ST.MQSS AS          [Safety Stock Pct]
,               SSQT*ST.MQSS/100 AS [Safety Stock Allocation]
--,               ST2.SSPL AS         [Priority 7 Safety Stock Level]
FROM            M3.CSAFPR ST
JOIN            M3.OCUSMA OC ON ST.OBV2 = OC.CUNO AND ST.PREX = 2
JOIN            Prd_ItemMaster IM on ST.OBV1 = IM.[Item Number] 
JOIN            M3.MITBAL MB ON ST.OBV1 = MB.ITNO
--LEFT JOIN       M3.CSAFPR ST2 ON ST.OBV1 = ST2.OBV1 AND ST2.PREX = 7
AND             SSQT <> 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          ST.OBV1 AS         [Item Number]
,               ST.SSPL AS         [Priority 7 Safety Stock Level]
FROM            M3.CSAFPR ST
WHERE           PREX = 7
) B             ON A.[Item Number] = B.[Item Number]
